sizing_rule.note: Geometric optimal portfolio methodology (Vince) allocates weights across multi-component portfolio using HPR statistics and correlation matrix. Optimal_f value not disclosed by author. Portfolio weight constraint: S = 1.0 (standard) or S > 1.0 if leverage/NIC exclusion applied.

source_rule_text: Allocate portfolio weights across multiple market components based on geometric optimal portfolio methodology using expected returns, variance, and correlation coefficients.
